prompt: Create a cinematic anime-style night landscape from a high mountain observation deck overlooking Hakodate. The scene contains exactly 1 teenage girl seen from behind, exactly 1 coin-operated public telescope in front of her, exactly 1 curved metal safety railing, and exactly 1 information signboard on the left with the visible Japanese title 函館山展望台. The girl has long dark brown hair blowing gently in the wind, and wears a light gray hoodie, short dark pleated skirt, white socks, and black sneakers; she stands quietly with a contemplative posture, looking out over the glowing city and harbor below. The foreground deck is dimly lit in cool blue shadows, with the telescope centered slightly right and aimed toward the horizon. Beyond the railing, render a vast coastal city at night with dense warm orange and white streetlights, winding roads, a bright shoreline, a calm bay on the right, distant dark mountain silhouettes, and a faint purple-blue twilight band near the horizon. Above, fill the sky with countless sharp stars and a dramatic Milky Way sweeping diagonally from the upper left toward the center, with deep navy blues and subtle violet nebula tones. Use a wide 4:3 composition, highly detailed background, soft atmospheric perspective, gentle rim lighting on the girl, tranquil mood, crisp anime film still quality, realistic lighting, no text overlays except the signboard.
